description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a prominent gable roof and a secondary shed roof section. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, contrasted by a large, dark rectangular chimney on one side. The front of the house includes a covered porch with wooden railings and steps, providing a welcoming entryway. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on the main facade, while triangular clerestory windows accentuate the upper gable. The roof is finished in a reddish-brown metal, giving the structure a contemporary yet warm appearance. The overall form is compact and functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern house with a reddish-brown gable roof, large windows, and a covered front porch with wooden railings.
description_view_0: Side view showing two large rectangular windows, the tall dark chimney, and the edge of the covered porch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entry steps, large windows, and triangular clerestory windows under the gable roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long expanse of the roof, a single window, and the side of the porch.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the gable roof and chimney, with no visible windows or entry features.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, wooden railings, and a simple main door under an overhanging roof
